For each damage, find the corresponding item in policy.items by itemType. If item.enchantment >= 8, halve the damage amount before applying deductible.

Note that the test policy item has cursed: false, material: "steel", enchantment: 9. Look up by matching type field. Simplest match: find first item where item.type === damage.itemType.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text:
All 28 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added high-enchantment clause to `claim`. For each damage, find the matching item in `policy.items` by type. If `item.enchantment >= 8`, halve the damage amount before subtracting the 100 G deductible.
**Result**: All tests now pass (28 passing, 27 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal change — looked up item by `type === itemType`, applied 50% halving only when enchantment threshold met, then existing deductible/cap logic remained intact. Updated the parameter types to include `items` on policy and `itemType` on damages, matching the test's data shape. No additional logic (dragon material, multiple-items handling, errors) was added — those are for future tests.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
